scenarios.capability: Hadolint syntax validation and rule classification
scenarios.reason: Agent can analyse a provided Dockerfile for DL-prefixed hadolint rule violations entirely from file content.

scenarios.capability: Security scan: hardcoded secrets, missing USER, and port exposure
scenarios.reason: Agent can detect hardcoded credentials, missing USER directive, and exposed sensitive ports from Dockerfile content without executing Checkov.

scenarios.capability: Layer ordering and cache efficiency best practices audit
scenarios.reason: Agent can evaluate COPY ordering, cache cleanup placement, and combined RUN commands from static Dockerfile analysis.
Agent can identify opportunities to introduce multi-stage builds and distroless images from examining a single-stage Dockerfile.

scenarios.capability: Severity-categorised findings report with fix proposals
scenarios.reason: Agent can produce a complete four-tier severity report with before/after code blocks from static analysis of a provided Dockerfile.
